candidate_check.description: OL 8 must prevent special devices on non-root local partitions.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify all non-root local partitions are mounted with the "nodev" option with the following command:

$ sudo mount | grep '^/dev\S* on /\S' | grep --invert-match 'nodev'

If any output is produced, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the "/etc/fstab" to use the "nodev" option on all non-root local partitions.
title: OL 8 must prevent special devices on non-root local partitions.
